title: ALTENEW BLOG HOP & GIVEAWAY
excerpt: Hello friend! I am excited to be a part of the Altenew blog hop in celebration of the new November release . Scroll on down to the bottom for the giveaway details. I’ve been on a creative journaling kick for…
body:
Hello friend! I am excited to be a part of the Altenew blog hop in celebration of the new November release. Scroll on down to the bottom for the giveaway details. I’ve been on a creative journaling kick for some years now. Here are the first few pages that were so fun to put together.

There’s also a YouTube video hop happening and more chances to win prizes, so be sure to check that out!

The watercolors have been a staple item in my collection for years and continues to inspire all kinds of creativity. Let me know in the comments what your favorite creative projects are at the moment!

Giveaway info: 

  • $300 in total prizes! To celebrate this release, Altenew is giving away a $100 gift certificate to 1 lucky winner and a $50 gift certificate to 4 winners! Please leave a comment on the Altenew Card Blog and/or each designer’s blog post on the blog hop list below by October 13th for a chance to win. Altenew will draw 5 random winners from the comments left on each stop of this blog hop and announce the winners on the Altenew Winners Page on October 15th, 2024.

    1. The winner of the $100 gift certificate will be chosen from comments left on the Altenew blog. 

You are invited to the Inlinkz link party!

Click here to enter
